caribbean.headline: Heavy Rainfall Hits Martinique Amid Light Winds
caribbean.paragraph: Martinique is experiencing heavy rainfall with a 95% rain probability, accompanied by light winds of 12 kt and wave heights reaching 3.0 ft from the southeast. St. Lucia sees similar calm conditions with 11 kt winds and less than 10% rain probability, keeping marine conditions stable across the Lesser Antilles today.

mediterranean.headline: Heavy Rain Likely with Light Winds in Venice Today
mediterranean.paragraph: Venice is experiencing a 71% rain probability with light winds up to 13 kt and wave heights reaching 1.4 ft from the SSE. Marseille follows with stronger winds at 23 kt but less rain impact, indicating localized heavy precipitation around Venice in the Central Mediterranean.
